text.title: Alert Triage Decision Tree Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for alert-triage-decision-tree.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the alert from a production system with a paging surface?

example.trace: Alert fires with error rate 4.2% on tenant cohort 12% → severity=p1, blast_radius=cohort → route=page → owner=payments-oncall, sla_minutes=15 → audit entry written.
